title: SAI Canonical Ingestion Envelope (v1.2 Mock)
description: Strict payload contract required by the SAI downstream gateway. Enforces zero-trust fail-closed evaluation.

target_operation.description: The specific downstream API being invoked by the probabilistic agent.

structured_payload_body.description: The exact data package or parameters intended for the API.

required_invariants.description: Static, bounded mathematical or logical predicates the payload must satisfy.

policy_anchor.description: The overarching enterprise governance rule reference (e.g., TREASURY_TIER_1).

authority_context.description: A composite of the requesting actor and the session identifier.

payload_hash.description: Cryptographic hash generated pre-execution to guarantee intent integrity in transit.
